We bridge the gap between creative imagination and scientific rigour, offering degree programs in Architecture, Planning, Design and Engineering Management to create sustainable, resilient, and inclusive human settlements. The Institute empowers future professionals to build adaptive, equitable, pluralistic and aesthetically vibrant built environments that address the evolving challenges of a globalized world. New Institute Blueprint 70+ Acres Where a fully residential campus becomes a living lab for future urbanists. 50+ Mentors, Infinite Insights Learn from a permanent faculty whose expertise spans diverse academic and research areas. 9 Epicentres of Innovation Our 9 Research Centres don't just study the future; they build the Centres of Excellence that define it. 3-8-9 Academic Excellence From 3 foundational UG paths, practice based 8 Post Graduate programs to 9 Doctoral frontiers, we cover the entire spectrum of built environment thought. Vibrant Student Community A melting pot of diverse perspectives, driven by a majority-forward gender inclusive community. Biodiversity by Design Sharing our 70-acre home with Neel Gai and migratory birds—where ecology isn't a subject, it’s a neighbour. Life Between Buildings From twin lakes to the Open Air Theatre, participate in the spaces that make the stories. Innovation and Impact 50+ active research and consultancy projects turning classroom concepts into city-scale realities. Student Achievements Celebrating excellence and accomplishments of our students Project (In)Between Walls Published on ArchDaily Khushi Shirur secured 1st position in the National Urban Design Competition. We are pleased to share that the project (In)Between Walls has been published on ArchDaily under the Student Project Awards, selected from global entries. Read More → 1st Prize in National Level Design Competition – ShelterGenius 3.0 SPA Bhopal students Sonavarshini R P, Shreya Arun Thorat, and Pranali Dhawas won 1st Prize in “ShelterGenius 3.0”. The competition was organised by Chandigarh University under InnovFest 2026. Read More → 2nd Runner-Up in Urban Innovation Challenge 2025 Honoured at Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi Team Priy Ranjan Yadav, Manasi Varade, and Pranali Dhawas won 2nd Runner-Up at the Urban Innovation Challenge 2025. The challenge was launched by Municipalika and Good Governance India Foundation (GGIF), in association with Daikin and supported by Ethos Empowers. Read More → SPA Bhopal is 1st Runner Up at NOSPLAN A contingent of 70 students from SPA Bhopal won the 1st Runner-Up Trophy at the 27th Annual NOSPLAN hosted by Parul University, Vadodara. Read More → Smart City Innovation Challenge Winner Team-SPA Bhopal won the Second-best Position in the Open Ideas National Competition 2025 (Season V) under the Rural Housing category. Key Dates: Submission: 26 Sep 2025 • Result: 20 Jan 2026 Competition Verticals: Affordable Urban Housing • Rural Housing • Slum Improvement & In-situ Development • Furniture & Interior Design Read More → 1st Prize Daida Foundation Global Urban Thesis Awards - 2025 Student Parnavi Harde presented award-winning Thesis on Rethinking Publicness and creating Equity in development from the Lens od spatial Justice: A case of Contested Lakefront, Mill Land and Public Engagement Spaces in the heart of Nagpur(India) .
